name: opl-flow
description: OPL Flow is a pragmatic Codex workflow profile for direct answers, inline execution, durable evidence, subagent boundaries, and verification gates.

interface.longDescription: OPL Flow packages a reusable Codex-first workflow inspired by Trellis and Superpowers: Direct/Inline/Durable task tiers, planner/executor/debugger/verifier role prompts, subagent dispatch contracts, durable writeback rules, and completion verification.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use OPL Flow to classify this task, choose the right role path, execute with live evidence, and verify before claiming completion.
